title: Leave
subtitle: Manage leave requests, approvals and track leave balances

allocation.title: Adjust leave allocation {{year}}
allocation.description: Set the allocated days for this employee per leave type. Leaving an override unchanged keeps the leave type's default.

roster.title: Company-wide leave balances
roster.subtitle: Remaining leave days per employee, broken down by leave type.
roster.searchPlaceholder: Search by name or employee code…
roster.emptyHint: Try changing the department filter or search term.
roster.noLeaveTypes: No leave types have been configured yet.

form.title: New Leave Request
form.description: Fill in the details to submit a leave request
form.resubmitDescription: Edit and resubmit a request that was returned
form.attachmentRequired: This leave type requires an attachment

validation.endBeforeStart: End date must be on or after start date

review.approveDescription: The request will be approved and deducted from the employee's balance.
review.rejectDescription: Enter a reason so the employee can edit and resubmit.

detail.title: Leave Request Details
detail.subtitle: View request info and approval progress
detail.watcherBanner: You are following this request (view-only, no approval rights).

timeline.title: Approval Progress
timeline.empty: This request has no approval steps yet

skipReason.NO_APPROVER: No approver found for this step
skipReason.SELF_APPROVAL: Skipped — you cannot approve your own request
skipReason.DUPLICATE_APPROVER: Skipped — same approver as a previous step

flows.title: Leave Approval Flows
flows.subtitle: Configure approval steps per department or company-wide default
flows.emptyHint: Create your first flow to set up the process

form.description: Define the order of approval steps for leave requests
form.name: Flow name
form.departmentHint: Department cannot be changed after creation

watchers.label: CC / Watchers (view-only)
watchers.hint: Watchers can view the request at any time but cannot approve. Optional.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel this request?
cancelDialog.description: This action cannot be undone. The request will be marked as Cancelled.

prorata.title: Auto pro-rata leave by join month
prorata.label: Enable pro-rata annual leave for new employees
prorata.help: When enabled, creating a new employee auto-calculates annual leave based on the months remaining in the year (counting the join month), rounded to the nearest 0.5 day. HR can still adjust manually afterward.

createErrors.LEAVE_OVERLAP: You already have a leave request overlapping these dates
createErrors.LEAVE_INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE: You don't have enough leave balance for this request
createErrors.LEAVE_TYPE_INACTIVE: This leave type is no longer active
createErrors.LEAVE_ATTACHMENT_REQUIRED: This leave type requires an attachment
createErrors.LEAVE_NO_WORKING_DAYS: The selected range contains no working days

flowErrors.LEAVE_FLOW_DUPLICATE: An approval flow already exists for this scope. Each department (and the company-wide default) can have only one — pick another department or edit the existing flow.
